x_coordinate.Description: Gaze x-coordinate on screen (raw pixels from EyeLink)

y_coordinate.Description: Gaze y-coordinate on screen (raw pixels from EyeLink)

pupil_size.Description: Left pupil size in camera sensor pixel area (EyeLink area units)

head_x.Description: Head position from EyeLink camera, horizontal axis

head_y.Description: Head position from EyeLink camera, vertical axis

head_z.Description: Head distance from EyeLink camera sensor

TaskDescription: Watch educational video [ Why are Stars Star-Shaped ] in Distracted Condition
